Testimonials.title: Trusted by Swiss
Testimonials.subtitle: Real results from real clients. Here's what they say about working with us.

marco.name: Marco Reizinho
marco.text: Very Professional! and the end product was amazing! Recommend! I was overloaded with offers, didn't know which company to choose from. A friend recommended Lopes2Tech if I wanted easy communication and simplicity in the process — and he nailed it! My small business is growing! Thank you 🙏

silvio.name: Silvio Valente
silvio.text: I needed a portfolio that truly reflected the quality of my work, and Lopes2Tech delivered exactly that. The website is clean, fast, and elegant. Clients constantly compliment how easy it is to navigate and book sessions. Couldn't be happier with the result.

ana.name: Ana Ribeiro
ana.text: Working with Lopes2Tech was a seamless experience from start to finish. They understood our brand, built a professional site that generates leads, and were always responsive throughout the process. Our online presence has never looked this credible.

Newsletter.description: Get insights on AI, SEO & web dev delivered to your inbox.

hero.title: Innovation That Drives Results
hero.description: We are a Swiss-based technology agency specializing in AI agents, web development, and automated solutions. We believe technology should serve people, not the other way around.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.description: We are a Swiss-based technology agency specializing in AI agents, web development, and automated solutions. We believe technology should serve people, not the other way around.

founder.title: About the Founder
founder.description1: I am a Full Stack Developer and the founder of Lopes2Tech, specializing in high-performance websites, intelligent automations, and AI-driven web applications. Based in Zurich but originally from Portugal (where Bacalhau à Brás and Pastéis de Nata are a religion), I combine technical precision with a deep passion for digital innovation.
founder.description2: My professional character is defined by a relentless drive to solve complex problems. I don't just write code; I architect digital ecosystems. From scalable SaaS platforms to autonomous AI agents, I leverage a modern stack—including Next.js, TypeScript, Python, and Supabase—to deliver solutions that are as robust as they are beautiful.
founder.quote: I simplify the digital landscape for businesses, building custom automations and web apps that work for you while you enjoy a Pastél de Nata.

hero.description: Based in Zurich, delivering digital excellence to the world.

liabilityContent.title: Liability for Content
liabilityContent.text: The author assumes no liability for the correctness, accuracy, timeliness, reliability, and completeness of the information. Liability claims against the author for material or immaterial damage resulting from access to, use or non-use of the published information, from misuse of the connection, or from technical malfunctions are excluded. All offers are non-binding. The author expressly reserves the right to change, supplement or delete parts of the pages or the entire offer without separate announcement or to cease publication temporarily or permanently.

liabilityLinks.title: Liability for Links
liabilityLinks.text: References and links to third-party websites are outside our area of responsibility. We reject any responsibility for such websites. Access and use of such websites are at the user's own risk.

copyright.title: Copyright (Urheberrechte)
copyright.text: The copyright and all other rights to content, images, photos, or other files on the website belong exclusively to Paulo Lopes / Lopes2Tech or the specifically named rights holders. For the reproduction of any elements, the written consent of the copyright holders must be obtained in advance.

general.title: 1. General Information
general.text1: At Lopes2Tech, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations—specifically the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nFADP/nDSG) and, where applicable, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
general.text2: This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you visit our website or use our services.

controller.title: 2. Responsible Person (Controller)
controller.text: The responsible party for data processing on this website is:

serverLogs.title: 3.1 Server Log Files
serverLogs.text: When you access our website, the provider of the pages automatically collects and stores information in so-called 'server log files,' including:
serverLogs.note: This data is not merged with other data sources. The processing is based on our legitimate interest in the technically error-free presentation and optimization of our website.

contact.title: 3.2 Contact Form and Email
contact.text: If you send us inquiries via the contact form or email, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact details you provided there (Name, Email, Phone, Company/Practice), will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not pass on this data without your consent.

booking.title: 3.3 Appointment Booking (Cal.com)
booking.text: We use the service Cal.com to offer online appointment booking. When you book an appointment, the data you enter (Name, Email, Phone, Reason for Appointment) is processed by Cal.com.
booking.note: Please check Cal.com's privacy policy for details on how they handle data.

chatbot.title: 3.4 AI Chatbot Assistant
chatbot.text: Our website utilizes an AI-powered chatbot to assist with inquiries. When you interact with the chat:

list.process: The text you input is processed to generate a response.
list.warning: Important: Do not enter sensitive health data (patient names, medical conditions) into the public website chatbot.
list.providers: Data may be processed by third-party AI providers (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic) solely for the purpose of generating the answer.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.text: Our website uses 'cookies.' These are small text files that are stored on your device.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.text: Necessary for the technical operation of the website.

analytical.title: Analytical Cookies
analytical.text: Help us understand how visitors use the site.

cookies.note: You can configure your browser to reject cookies, but this may limit the functionality of the website.

analytics.title: 5. Analytics and Third-Party Tools
analytics.text: To improve our service, we may use analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics or Vercel Analytics). These tools use cookies to analyze user behavior. The IP addresses are typically anonymized before processing. You can opt-out of this tracking via our Cookie Banner or your browser settings.

security.title: 6. Data Security (SSL/TLS)
security.text: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content, such as orders or inquiries you send to us, this site uses SSL or TLS encryption. You can recognize an encrypted connection by the fact that the address line of the browser changes from 'http://' to 'https://' and by the lock symbol in your browser line.

transfer.title: 7. Data Transfer to Third Parties and Abroad
transfer.text: We only pass on your data to third parties if this is necessary for the fulfillment of the contract (e.g., hosting, scheduling tools) or if you have consented. Some of these service providers may be located outside of Switzerland (e.g., USA). In these cases, we ensure that appropriate data protection safeguards (such as Standard Contractual Clauses) are in place to comply with Swiss nDSG and GDPR standards.

rights.title: 8. Your Rights

list.info: Request information about your stored personal data at any time.
list.correction: Request the correction of incorrect data.
list.deletion: Request the deletion of your data (Right to be forgotten), provided there are no legal retention obligations.
list.revocation: Revoke your consent to data processing at any time.

rights.contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us directly at

changes.title: 9. Changes to this Privacy Policy
changes.text: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy so that it always complies with current legal requirements or to implement changes to our services in the privacy policy (e.g., when introducing new services). The new privacy policy will then apply to your next visit.

scope.title: 1. Scope of Application
scope.text: These General Terms and Conditions (hereinafter 'GTC') apply to all business relationships between Lopes2Tech / Paulo Lopes (hereinafter 'Contractor') and its customers (hereinafter 'Client'). They apply to all services provided, including but not limited to website development, software engineering, AI automations, and consulting.

subject.title: 2. Subject of the Contract
subject.text: The Contractor provides services in the field of IT and automation. The specific scope of services is defined in the respective individual offer or service contract.

web.title: Web & Software
web.description: Development of websites, applications, and dashboards.

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.description: Implementation of chatbots, voice agents, and workflow automations.

conclusion.title: 3. Conclusion of Contract
conclusion.text: Offers made by the Contractor are valid for 30 days unless otherwise stated. The contract is concluded upon:

list.acceptance: The written acceptance of the offer by the Client (email is sufficient).
list.deposit: The payment of an initial deposit.
list.commencement: The commencement of actual service provision by the Contractor with the Client's knowledge.

list.content: Provide all necessary content (text, images, logos) in a timely manner.
list.access: Grant the necessary access rights (hosting, API keys, domain registrar) required for the project.
list.review: Review deliverables and provide feedback within 5 working days. If no feedback is received within this period, the deliverable is deemed accepted.

projectServices.title: 5.1 Project Services
projectServices.text: Unless otherwise agreed in the individual offer, the following payment terms apply:

small.title: Small Projects
small.subtitle: Up to CHF 2,500
small.text: 100% of the project fee is due immediately upon conclusion of the contract.

standard.title: Standard & Large Projects
standard.subtitle: Above CHF 2,500
standard.deposit: 50% Deposit: Due immediately to reserve resources.

projectServices.terms: Invoices are payable within 20 days net.

recurring.title: 5.2 Recurring Services
recurring.text: Fees for ongoing maintenance or SaaS components (e.g., Chatbot hosting) are billed monthly or annually in advance. The cancellation period for recurring services is 30 days to the end of the month, unless a minimum contract term was agreed upon.

list.beforeWork: The Client may cancel the contract before work begins and receive a full deposit refund.
list.afterWork: If work has already started, the Client is obligated to pay for all work completed to date, calculated at the hourly rate agreed upon or a pro-rated portion of the total fee.
list.contractorTermination: The Contractor may terminate the contract if the Client fails to provide necessary materials or feedback for more than 30 days despite reminders.

list.rights: Upon full payment of the agreed fee, the Client receives the usage rights for the created software/website.
list.reuse: The Contractor retains the right to reuse generic code modules, libraries, and design patterns developed during the project for other clients (standard software engineering practice).
list.guarantee: The Client guarantees that all materials provided to the Contractor (images, texts) do not violate third-party rights.

ai.title: 7. Specific Provisions for AI Services
ai.text: The Client acknowledges that services involving Artificial Intelligence (AI) (e.g., Chatbots, RAG systems, Voice Agents) depend on third-party providers (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Retell AI).

accuracy.label: Accuracy:
accuracy.text: The Contractor cannot guarantee that AI outputs are 100% accurate. The Client is responsible for verifying critical information generated by AI.

availability.label: Availability:
availability.text: The Contractor is not liable for service interruptions caused by third-party API failures (e.g., if ChatGPT is down).

costs.label: Costs:
costs.text: Unless strictly included in a flat fee, variable API usage costs (token usage) may be billed to the Client or paid directly by the Client to the provider.

warranty.title: 8.1 Warranty
warranty.text: The Contractor warrants that the software/website is functional and free of critical defects at the time of acceptance. The warranty period is 3 months from delivery.
warranty.note: The warranty does not cover defects caused by third-party updates (e.g., a WordPress plugin update breaking the site) or unauthorized changes by the Client.
warranty.postWarranty: After the warranty period expires, bug fixes and updates are provided under the active maintenance plan or billed hourly at CHF 120/hour.

liability.title: 8.2 Liability
liability.text: To the extent permitted by Swiss law, the Contractor's liability is limited to intent and gross negligence. Liability for slight negligence, indirect damages, or consequential damages (e.g., loss of profit, data loss) is excluded.
liability.note: The Contractor is not liable for data privacy violations caused by the Client's misuse of the provided tools (e.g., entering patient data into a non-secure field).

forceMajeure.title: 8.3 Force Majeure
forceMajeure.text: Neither party shall be held liable for delays or failures in performance resulting from events beyond their reasonable control, including but not limited to natural disasters, pandemics, wars, strikes, governmental actions, or infrastructure failures.

dataProtection.title: 9. Data Protection and Confidentiality
dataProtection.text: Both parties agree to treat all business secrets and confidential information obtained during the business relationship as strictly confidential. The Contractor processes personal data in accordance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nDSG).
dataProtection.retention: Project files, backups, and related data are retained for 12 months after project completion. Clients are responsible for downloading and archiving their project files before this period expires.

severability.title: Severability
severability.text: Should individual provisions of these GTC be invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.

jurisdiction.title: Place of Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.text: The exclusive place of jurisdiction for all disputes arising from this contract is Zurich, Switzerland.

contact.title: Contact for Legal Inquiries
contact.text: For questions regarding these terms and conditions, please contact: Email: paulo@lopes2tech.ch | Phone: +41 78 798 95 33

FeaturedProjects.title: Software Built for
FeaturedProjects.subtitle: Vertical SaaS products designed from scratch — each one solving a real problem for a specific industry.
FeaturedProjects.hint: Click any product to explore its features

mimesa.description: miMesa is an all-in-one platform for restaurants to manage reservations, tables, and guests — reducing no-shows and increasing efficiency so your team can focus on hospitality.

features.0: Smart reservation system with real-time availability
features.1: Interactive table map with drag-and-drop management
features.3: Guest profiles with preferences, visits & spend history
features.4: Walk-in & waitlist manager with live queue tracking
features.6: Analytics dashboard: covers, peak hours, revenue trends

clinika.description: ClíniKa OS is a complete practice management platform for clinics and health professionals — from online booking to GDPR-compliant patient records, all in one secure dashboard.

features.0: Public booking page optimized for mobile
features.2: Basic CRM for client profiles and visit history
features.4: Team management with individual hours & services

darkmonkey.description: Dark Monkey is a premium gamified e-commerce platform where shopping feels like progression. Built with limited drops, XP tiers, product customization, and a brand ecosystem that keeps customers coming back.

features.0: Gamified XP system — Bronze → Silver → Gold → VIP tiers
features.1: Limited-edition drops with countdown timers & queues
features.2: Product customization engine with live preview
features.3: Stripe Checkout with Apple Pay & Google Pay
features.5: Loyalty rewards, referrals & abandoned cart automation

menteiq.description: menteIQ is an AI-native business command center for European freelancers, consultants, and SMEs. Multi-model AI chat (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini), CRM pipeline, QR-Bill invoicing, and a RAG knowledge base — all in one platform built for Swiss & EU compliance.

features.0: Multi-model AI chat — GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini Pro
features.1: CRM with Kanban pipeline (Lead → Client → Churned)
features.2: Swiss QR-Bill & EU SEPA invoice generation
features.3: RAG Knowledge Base — AI answers from your own documents
features.4: Bulk CSV/Excel import with duplicate detection
